gloss: Person — individuals, real or fictional (e.g. Wilfried Schneider).
Organization — companies, institutions, bands, teams, agencies (e.g. Zest Airways).
Location — geopolitical entities, places, geographic features (e.g. Philippines).
Number — numeric quantities not otherwise typed (e.g. 24, 1.2 million).
Miscellaneous — named entities not covered above: creative works, events, products, nationalities, etc.
